chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2606 - وَ سَأَلَهُ لَيْثٌ اَلْمُرَادِيُّ : عَنِ اَلثَّوْبِ اَلْمُعْلَمِ هَلْ يُحْرِمُ فِيهِ اَلرَّجُلُ قَالَ «نَعَمْ إِنَّمَا يُكْرَهُ اَلْمُلْحَمُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2606 - Laith al-Muradi asked Imam (as) about a man entering Ihram in an embroidered garment.
Imam (as) said: "Yes, it is permissible. What is disliked is a fully patterned garment (mulham)."
